headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Sempra (SRE) After Its Strong 1 Year Share Price Run?
summary: Wondering if Sempra at around US$93.46 is offering fair value right now, or if markets are pricing in something you might be missing? The stock has eased 2.6% over the past week and is roughly flat over 30 days. It shows returns of 4.2% year to date and 37.1% over the past year, which may have changed how investors view its risk and opportunity. Recent coverage has focused on Sempra as a key US utilities name, with attention on how it fits into broader power infrastructure trends and...

headline: White House to pay TotalEnergies $1 billion to kill off East Coast wind farm projects
summary: The announcement comes as the Iran war disrupts global oil and gas supplies, making the U.S.' development of its LNG resources more urgent.
